root.string: Add: NPC defenses default to All
Add: NPC Random Level and Hits
Initiative: Auto roll each round for
RM Table Results: Send description to chat
RM Table Results: Effect Visibility - Ally
RM Table Results: Effect Visibility - Non-ally
Turn: Skip dead or unconscious actor
Table Resolver Apply: NPC RRs auto roll
Table Resolver Apply: Roll NPC result table
NPC: Constitution used to determine death
ChL #11.1: DP based on Stat Bonus
ChL #11.3: Additional DP % for Secondary Skills
ChL #24: An Alternative Static Maneuver Table
RMC5-5.2: All Stats used for DPs
4.22 Elves And Self Discipline: Sneaky Races
4.22 Modify SD for Stalk and Hide Skills
4.22 Modify SD for Adrenal Moves Skills

This will allow the user to control the NPCs actions in the Combat Tracker by giving access to the appropriate sections. Setting it to blank will remove ownership. NOTE: The user will have to close and reopen the Combat Tracker to see the change in icons.
* Result Roll *\nDouble-clicking or dragging these dice will do a Result Table Roll action which will fill in the field on the Table Resolver for the GM.
* Reset Button *\nResets the Table Resolver by setting everything back to the defaults except for the Roll Stack.
* Apply Button *\nApply the selected table results. You must have a table result selected and a target for the result to be applied to.
* Attack Grid *\nThis section contains information used with the table in the top grid of the Table Resolver).
* Attack Grid Roll *\nClick or drag a roll to edit the number.

* Attack Grid Roll Modifier *\nThis modifier that will be applied to the Attack Grid Roll to determine the Attack Grid Total Roll. It is the total of all the selected modifiers in the Modifiers section.
* Attack Grid Total Roll *\nThe Attack Grid will automatically select the row of the table that matches unless it exceeds the Maximum Roll which will be used instead.
* Unmodified Roll *\nThe first roll if there are multiple rolls. If the Unmodified Roll matches an unmodified roll [UM] result then it will use that result instead of rhe Attack Grid Roll Total.
* Hits Multiplier *\nThe hits for each Table Resolver entry will be multiplied by this value and will show in the table.
* Maximum Table Result *\nUses Max Level from the item/attack and prevents the Attack Grid Roll Total from exceeding it. (1=105, 2=120, 3=135, 4=150.)
* Attacker/Actor *\nDrop effects and table results here to apply them to the attacker/actor.
* Defender/Target *\nDrop effects and table results here to apply them to the defender/target.
* Attack Grid Modifiers *\nThis section contains the modifiers that will be applied to the Attack Grid Roll.
* Include *\nIf checked it will include the modifier in the Attack Grid Roll Modifier.
* Result Grid *\nThis section contains information used with the result table (bottom grid of the Table Resolver).
* Result Grid Roll *\nClick to edit the number or Double-click or drag to do a Result Table Roll action which will fill in the field on the Table Resolver for the GM.
* Result Grid Critical Modifier *\nThis modifier that will be applied to the Result Grid Roll to determine the Result Grid Total Roll.
* Result Grid Total Roll *\nThe Result Grid will automatically select the row of the table that matches.
* Critical Modifier Description *\nThe defender's critical modifier description. (Large, Super Large, -1 Severity or -2 Severities)
* Result Table List *\nThe list of result tables to resolve. Click an entry in the list to load that result table.
* Result Table *\nClick to load result table.
* Applied *\nIf checked it shows that the result table has already been applied.
* Roll Stack *\nThis section contains the different rolls that need to be resolved in the Table Resolver.
* Resolve Button *\nClick here to resolve this item.
Copy the PC to create a new NPC
The stat bonus has been reduced because of the armor quickness penalty.
The Encumbrance: Penalty applies to BMR option is Off so the encumbrance penalty isn't being applied.
Switch Temp Roll and Extra Roll columns.
Switch Temp Roll and Pot Roll columns.
Switch Temp Roll and Pot Roll columns.
Switch Temp Roll and Pot Roll columns.
Switch Temp Roll and Extra Roll columns.
Switch Temp Roll and Pot Roll columns.
Open Martial Arts Attacks that can be added to the Combat tab.
Open Spell Attacks that can be added to the Combat tab.
These fields are updated based on the Equipped Armor or Helmet protection fields. They are used for the conditional critical results that are looking for a particular location's armor type.
EQUIPPED ARMOR, WEAPONS & POWER POINT ITEM

Equipped Armor: Drop down list include inventory items of type Armor which aren't Arm Greaves, Leg Greaves or Helmets. \nArmor Types that include the greaves should be combined into one item. There are new versions in Character Law.
Equipped Helmet: Drop down list include inventory items of type Helmet or with Helm in the item name

Equipped Primary Hand: Drop down list include inventory items of these types - 
One-Handed Slashing
One-Handed Concussion
Two-Handed Weapon
Pole Arm
Missile Weapon
Thrown Weapon
Natural Weapon

Equipped Secondary Hand: Drop down list include inventory items of these types - 
One-Handed Slashing
One-Handed Concussion
Thrown Weapon
Natural Weapon
Shield
Equipped Spell Adder/PP Multiplier: Drop down list include inventory items that match the character's realm and have Spell Adder or PP Multiplier values greater than 0
These fields are updated based on the Equipped Armor or Helmet protection fields. They are used for the conditional critical results that are looking for a particular location's armor type.
Remove New Skill Ranks from Ranks
Add New Skill Ranks to Ranks
* Extraordinary Spell Casting Failure Modifier *\nThis value will be added to the fumble range of 2 to determine if there is spell failure
This field will filter the inventory items by the item type.
Dead Weight if the items are carried or equipped. If equipped and the items is of type Armor, Helmet or Clothing, it won't count as encumbrance so the dead weight will be 0.
NOTE: Only skills from loaded modules and the campaign will automatically appear here.
Character Law Option 23.1: Expanded Level Bonuses for Professions (RM2)
Character Law Option 23.2: Expanded Level Bonuses for Professions (RMSS Conversion Friendly)
Level Bonus Groups/Categories from Rolemaster Companion 2
Drag Spell List links here to add them to the list.
Racial Level Offset with Bkgrd Opts
Racial Level Offset w/o Bkgrd Opts
Drag Weapon links here to add them to the list.
Drag Defense links here to add them to the list.
Drag Skill links here to add them to the list.
Drag Spell List links here to add them to the list.
* Extraordinary Spell Casting Failure Modifier *\nThis value will be added to the fumble range of 2 to determine if there is spell failure
Refresh Party Average Level and Experience Points
